---
name: "🚀 Performance issue"
about: Report slow or inefficient parts of the app
title: "[PERFORMANCE] "
labels: performance
---

### Describe the issue
What feels slow or unresponsive?

### Steps to reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Perform action '...'
3. Notice slowdown

### Expected performance
What would “fast enough” look like? (e.g. <1 second load, smooth scrolling)

### Actual results
- Approximate time taken: [e.g. 5–6 seconds]
- Frequency: [always / sometimes / rare]

### Device / environment
- OS: [e.g. Windows 11, iOS 17]
- Browser/App version: [e.g. Chrome 122, Safari]
- Hardware details (if relevant): [CPU, RAM, network speed]

### Additional context
Screenshots, recordings, or logs if helpful.
